> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add flutter/skills --skill flutter-apply-architecture-best-practices --skill flutter-build-responsive-layout --skill flutter-add-widget-test --skill flutter-setup-declarative-routing --skill flutter-fix-layout-issues --skill flutter-add-integration-test --skill flutter-setup-localization -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/flutter-add-widget-test`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add flutter/skills --skill flutter-apply-architecture-best-practices --skill flutter-build-responsive-layout --skill flutter-add-widget-test --skill flutter-setup-declarative-routing --skill flutter-fix-layout-issues --skill flutter-add-integration-test --skill flutter-setup-localization -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Official Flutter skill for component-level widget tests using WidgetTester. Verifies rendering, taps, scrolls, text entry for specific widgets. Example: test a CustomButton onTap.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add flutter/skills --skill flutter-add-integration-test --skill flutter-add-widget-test --skill flutter-apply-architecture-best-practices --skill flutter-build-responsive-layout --skill flutter-fix-layout-issues --skill flutter-setup-declarative-routing --skill flutter-setup-localization -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`; status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[flutter/skills](https://github.com/flutter/skills) (official Flutter team)

## Comparable Alternatives

Other widget/unit test skills for Flutter or React Native; general UI component test skills.
